overview: The backend todo-api has no dependencies and must exist before the frontend can consume it, so it is built first. The todo-web SPA depends on the API and is built in phase 2.

phases.name: Backend Foundation
phases.description: Independent backend API providing auth, tasks, and categories endpoints.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Authenticate users with bcrypt-hashed passwords and issue 7-day JWT session cookies
Provide CRUD endpoints for tasks and categories with per-user isolation
Validate inputs (non-empty titles, due dates within today..+10y)
Support filtering by category/status and sorting by due date
Expose /health endpoint and enforce CSRF via double-submit cookie
components.architectureContext: Stateless Go HTTP service on port 9090 consumed by the todo-web SPA over /api. Holds data in an in-memory thread-safe store behind an interface for future swap.
keyConsiderations: Use sync.RWMutex-backed maps; design store behind interface for swap
JWT via golang-jwt/jwt/v5 in HttpOnly Secure SameSite=Lax cookie
CSRF double-submit: csrf cookie + X-CSRF-Token header on mutations
Return 403 on cross-user access; 400 for validation errors with {error} JSON
CORS with credentials for web origin; multi-stage Docker to distroless
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todooo API
  version: 1.0.0
servers:
  - url: /api
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
  /auth/register:
    post:
      summary: Register a new user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email: { type: string, format: email }
                password: { type: string, minLength: 8 }
      responses:
        '201': { description: Created }
        '409': { description: Email exists }
  /auth/login:
    post:
      summary: Login
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK, sets session cookie }
        '401': { description: Invalid credentials }
  /auth/logout:
    post:
      summary: Logout
      responses:
        '204': { description: Session terminated }
  /auth/me:
    get:
      summary: Current user
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
        '401': { description: Unauthorized }
  /categories:
    get:
      summary: List categories
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
    post:
      summary: Create category
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [name]
              properties: { name: { type: string } }
      responses:
        '201': { description: Created }
  /categories/{id}:
    delete:
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '204': { description: Deleted }
  /tasks:
    get:
      summary: List tasks
      parameters:
        - in: query
          name: category
          schema: { type: string }
        - in: query
          name: status
          schema: { type: string, enum: [all, active, completed] }
        - in: query
          name: sort
          schema: { type: string, enum: [due_asc, due_desc] }
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
    post:
      summary: Create task
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [title]
              properties:
                title: { type: string, minLength: 1 }
                description: { type: string }
                dueDate: { type: string, format: date }
                categoryId: { type: string, nullable: true }
      responses:
        '201': { description: Created }
        '400': { description: Validation error }
  /tasks/{id}:
    get:
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
        '403': { description: Forbidden }
        '404': { description: Not found }
    put:
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                title: { type: string }
                description: { type: string }
                dueDate: { type: string, format: date, nullable: true }
                categoryId: { type: string, nullable: true }
                completed: { type: boolean }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Updated }
        '403': { description: Forbidden }
    delete:
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: id
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '204': { description: Deleted }
        '403': { description: Forbidden }

phases.name: Frontend SPA
phases.description: React SPA that consumes the todo-api.

components.name: todo-web
responsibilities: Call todo-api with credentials and CSRF header
Render task filters, sorting, overdue highlighting, and delete confirmation
Show toast notifications and persist unsaved form drafts in localStorage
Serve /health and runtime API base URL config via nginx
components.architectureContext: Vite-built React SPA served by nginx; talks to todo-api over /api (proxied or via ingress). Only downstream dependency is todo-api.
keyConsiderations: fetch with credentials:'include' and X-CSRF-Token from csrf cookie
Due date picker clamped today..+10y; overdue red, completed strike-through
Responsive design (Tailwind or CSS modules); Intl.DateTimeFormat dates
Runtime config.js generated from env at container start
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todooo Web
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health
      responses:
        '200': { description: OK }
